description_long: This object is a reddish-brown crustacean with a broad, flattened body and a segmented, armored exoskeleton. The cephalothorax is wide and shield-like, tapering into a segmented abdomen that curves slightly downward. The surface is rough and matte, with small spines and ridges along the edges of the carapace and abdomen. Several short, spindly legs are visible beneath the body, but there are no prominent claws. The tail is fan-shaped and slightly upturned, and the overall appearance is robust and compact. Faint antennae are visible at the front, and the eyes are not clearly distinguishable.
description: A reddish-brown, broad, and flattened crustacean with a segmented, armored body and rough, matte surface. It has short legs, no visible claws, and a fan-shaped tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the crustacean, highlighting the segmentation and the curve of the abdomen.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the broad, fan-shaped tail and the full width of the cephalothorax.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the segmentation and the downward curve of the abdomen.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the shield-like cephalothorax and the overall width of the body.
